name: *GHETTOLAND
overview:
JIMMY wants to be the next breakout star in music. With help from his girlfriend, a few loved ones and the vast array of skills he's learned over a decade, JIMMY attempts to conquer the near-impossible challenge of translating a cult online following into real world success.

Despite these huge dreams, he must also deal with the conflicts of being in his early 20s, healing from a bad upbringing and offering a unique perspective to the creative world.
